prompt_text_before_clear: CONTINUE EXACTLY FROM PREVIOUS FRAME. CONTINUE FROM PREVIOUS CLIP. Clip 3 of 4. Exactly 10 seconds continuous on-screen motion. DIRECTOR CAMERA PLAN. Shot type: tracking_shot. Camera movement: telephoto documentary tracking — Lateral or forward tracking matched to subject speed.. Lens: telephoto 85–135mm equivalent. Composition: subject in lower two-thirds with habitat depth. Framing: mid-wide tracking frame with lead room. Visual objective: The dragon egg hatches and the boy bonds with the baby dragon — capture authentic animal behavior with cinematic tension. VISUAL MEMORY LOCK — MAINTAIN EXACTLY THE SAME SUBJECT IDENTITY FROM CLIP 1. Same subject, same colors, same markings, same proportions, same appearance. Do not redesign subject. Do not introduce new variants. No species swap. No wardrobe reset. Subject: discovery of magical artifact (concept) Appearance lock: The same discovery of magical artifact remains the main on-screen subject in every clip. Markings locked: The same discovery of magical artifact rem SUBJECT BLOCK: Primary subject Boy Finds remains the unmistakable hero of every frame. Anatomy, silhouette, wardrobe (consistent outfit), and emotional intent stay locked. Story beat: Reveal the dragon egg beginning to crack open, the boy’s eyes wide with wonder as the baby dragon emerges, fragile yet majestic.. ENVIRONMENT BLOCK: Single continuous location — mystical forest and hidden village, forest and hides it from everyone. Depth layers: foreground texture, mid-ground action plane, background atmosphere with readable vertical framing. Weather, particulates, and set dressing remain coherent across the full 10 seconds. LIGHTING BLOCK: motivated cinematic key with volumetric atmosphere. Practical sources motivate shadows; rim light separates subject from background; no random exposure shifts or white-balance drift between seconds. CAMERA BLOCK: 35mm anamorphic lens personality with natural edge falloff. Framing: subject occupies lower two-thirds with headroom for Shorts safe zone. Depth of field: subject sharp, background softly separated. Camera movement must feel motivated and continuous — no unmotivated whip pans. MOTION BLOCK: Seconds 0–2 establish micro-movement and continuity read; seconds 2–7 execute the primary motivated action without hard cuts; seconds 7–10 decelerate into a stable end pose for Use Frame handoff. Motion direction flows forward through the scene — no reverse blocking. ATMOSPHERE BLOCK: Mood arc — Fear transforms into determination and protective care as the boy bonds with the dragon.. Palette: teal and amber cinematic color grade. Air density, haze, and environmental motion reinforce stakes without obscuring the subject. VISUAL DETAIL BLOCK: Material fidelity on skin, fabric, and surfaces. Hook detail: Striking imagery of the mystical forest and hidden village, centered on the boy’s discovery and concealment of the glowing dragon egg.. Conflict pressure: Introduction to the boy and discovery of the dragon egg in the forest. Stakes if unresolved: If the central question fails, Introduction to the boy and discovery of the dragon egg in the forest — viewer must feel the cost immediately.. Textures readable at mobile resolution; no mushy CGI plastic skin. CONTINUITY BLOCK: Same subject, same environment, same lighting vector, same camera language, same composition grammar as prior clips. vertical 9:16 cinematic realistic for vertical 9:16 YouTube Shorts. Mood: tense hopeful. Pacing: hook in first second, payoff before loop point. Camera: 35mm anamorphic lens personality with natural edge falloff. Audience: mobile-first scroll-stopping viewer.. STYLE BLOCK: cinematic realistic. cinematic realistic for vertical 9:16 YouTube Shorts. Pacing: hook in first second, payo Topic-specific detail: Incorporate subtle environmental storytelling elements that hint at ancient dragon lore embedded in the forest’s flora and fauna.; Emphasize the boy’s internal conflict through close-up shots capturing his nervous glances and protective gestures toward the egg.; Use atmospheric lighting shifts to mirror the emotional stakes, transitioning from shadowed fear to warm, hopeful illumination as the egg hatches.; Integrate natural soundscapes of the mystical forest to enhance tension and immersion, such as distant roars or rustling leaves signaling hidden dangers.; Highlight the tactile textures of the egg and the boy’s clothing to reinforce realism and material fidelity in close-up cinematic shots.. Strict negatives: no subtitles, no captions, no logos, no watermarks, no title cards, no on-screen text, no UI overlays, no scene jump, no unrelated location change, no wardrobe swap, no character replacement, no aspect ratio drift.
